_publications._publicationTitle: Next-generation variant exon screening: Moving forward in routine genetic disease investigations.

_contextSnippet: Based on best-match phenotype-genotype associations of genes known to be linked to skin diseases, 88 (66%) of patients had a positive gene finding... Of the 88 positive patients, 79 (90%) carried pathogenic SNVs/INDELs and 8 (9.5%) carried pathogenic CNVs
details: Successfully identified 88 positive gene findings out of 134 patients (66% diagnostic yield), with 79 (90%) carrying pathogenic SNVs/INDELs and 8 (9.5%) carrying pathogenic CNVs
